system.description: The Battle-Brother is a source of inspiration to those around him; when all seems lost, he stands defiant and by his deeds raises the warrior spirits of his comrades.
system.benefit: If the squad has suffered Cohesion Damage caused by the enemy in the present or previous round, the Battle-Brother may declare that his next action is an act to demonstrate that the squad is unbowed and unbroken. His next action may be a ranged attack, a melee attack, or a Challenging (+0) Fellowship Test representing a roar of defiance or exhortation to heroism. If the test for that action succeeds, the Battle-Brother and those within Support Range regain all of the Cohesion they lost in this or the last round.

rollConfig.description: Fellowship test to restore squad cohesion

specialAbilities.name: Restore Cohesion
specialAbilities.description: When your squad suffers Cohesion damage, you can make an attack or Fellowship test. On success, all allies in support range regain lost Cohesion.
